summary: Conversion + Visibility + Role Clarity Pack testing completed. All 7 features tested successfully. Frontend pages rendering correctly with all required components, navigation, and CTAs.

features: Links to Customer Login and Partner Login
Contact form with all fields (name, email, company, phone, subject, message)
Subject dropdown with options (Bulk Pricing, Contract Terms, Recurring Orders, etc.)
'Business Accounts' card with Request Business Pricing button
Contact Information section with email, phone, office address
Metrics: Total Points, Current Tier (Bronze), People Referred, Referral Earnings
Navigation links: Marketplace, Services, Track Order, Expansion
EARN badge displayed on Referrals & Rewards nav item
Gold/amber highlighting for the referrals nav item

Contact page has complete form with Business Pricing CTA
Referrals page has hero card with sharing buttons (Copy Link, WhatsApp)
Dashboard shows BusinessPricingCtaBox at bottom with proper CTAs

All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

mocked_apis.note: All features are UI/navigation changes - no mocked APIs
